status: prospectively frozen new scoring run on two already inspected held-out families; post-hoc robustness, not a replacement primary endpoint
scientific_question: Do intermediate readouts favor exact excluded multi-token technical terms over equal-piece scientific alternatives?

cleavage.rationale: competing fracture path; equal two-piece tokenization

rapid-transformation.rationale: competing steel transformation product; equal three-piece tokenization

endpoint.first_piece: direct or Jacobian next-token logit at the original final prompt position
endpoint.remaining_pieces: teacher-forced conditional log probabilities under unchanged Gemma
endpoint.sequence_margin: target first-piece logit plus target remaining log probabilities minus the equal-length contrast score
endpoint.primary_summary: mean across registered band, then five prompts per family

success_rule.jacobian_specific: Jacobian-minus-direct family mean positive in both families

guardrails: does not alter original single-token vocabulary-rank endpoint
all prompts, layers, fits, and negative results retained
